infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Starvia Rider uses your location to navigate to pickups and drop-offs.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Starvia Rider uses your location in the background to track active deliveries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Starvia Rider needs access to your photos to update your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Starvia Rider needs camera access to take delivery proof photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Starvia Rider to update your profile picture.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Starvia Rider to take delivery proof photos.
